# all

**Type Property**

This is the default value for a physics body’s [doc://com.apple.scenekit/documentation/SceneKit/SCNPhysicsBody/collisionBitMask] property.

## Declaration

```swift
static var all: SCNPhysicsCollisionCategory { get }
```

## Discussion

With this collision mask, a physics body can collide with all other physics bodies.

## Constants

- **default**: The default [doc://com.apple.scenekit/documentation/SceneKit/SCNPhysicsBody/categoryBitMask] value for dynamic and kinematic bodies.
- **static**: The default [doc://com.apple.scenekit/documentation/SceneKit/SCNPhysicsBody/categoryBitMask] value for static bodies.
